index
3. SNARE-seq处理流程

SNARE-seq是一种单细胞共测技术，允许在同一细胞内同时测量转录组（RNA）和染色质可访问性（通常是ATAC-seq数据）。提供了每个细胞的基因表达和染色质状态之间的关系。

这是一个成年小鼠大脑的SNARE-seq数据集，原始数据可以从NCBI GEO这里下载：https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE126074

由于此数据集的片段文件并未公开提供，已将原始数据重新映射到mm10基因组，并使用Sinto创建了一个片段文件

  • 片段文件可以在此处下载：[https://signac-objects.s3.amazonaws.com/snareseq/fragments.sort.bed.gz](https://signac-objects.s3.amazonaws.com/snareseq/fragments.sort.bed.gz
  • 片段文件索引可以在此处下载：https://signac-objects.s3.amazonaws.com/snareseq/fragments.sort.bed.gz.tbi

用于从原始数据创建片段文件的代码可以在此处找到：https://github.com/timoast/SNARE-seq

数据加载
...

library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(Signac)
library(Seurat)
library(EnsDb.Hsapiens.v86)
library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
library(EnsDb.Mmusculus.v79)

rna <- Read10X("./data/GSE126074_AdBrainCortex_rna/", gene.column = 1)
atac <- Read10X("./data/GSE126074_AdBrainCortex_atac/", gene.column = 1)
fragments <- "./data/fragments.sort.bed.gz"

# 创建RNA和ATAC assay
snare <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = rna)
snare[['ATAC']] <- CreateChromatinAssay(
  counts = atac,
  sep = c(":", "-"),
  genome = "mm10",
  fragments = fragments
)

# extract gene annotations from EnsDb
annotations <- GetGRangesFromEnsDb(ensdb = EnsDb.Mmusculus.v79)

seqlevels(annotations) <- paste0('chr', seqlevels(annotations))
genome(annotations) <- "mm10"
Annotation(snare[["ATAC"]]) <- annotations

Quality control
...

ATAC QC
...

DefaultAssay(snare) <- "ATAC"
snare <- TSSEnrichment(snare)
snare <- NucleosomeSignal(snare)
snare$blacklist_fraction <- FractionCountsInRegion(
  object = snare,
  assay = 'ATAC',
  regions = blacklist_mm10   # blacklisst_mm10是Signac包自带的
)

Idents(snare) %>% levels()
 # [1] "09A" "09B" "09C" "09D" "09E" "09F" "09G" "09H" "09I" "09J" "09K" "09L"

VlnPlot(
  snare,
  features = c("nCount_RNA", "nCount_ATAC", "TSS.enrichment",
               "nucleosome_signal", "blacklist_fraction"),
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 5
)

Idents(snare) <- "all"  # group all cells together, rather than by replicate
VlnPlot(
  snare,
  features = c("nCount_RNA", "nCount_ATAC", "TSS.enrichment",
               "nucleosome_signal", "blacklist_fraction"),
  pt.size = 0,
  ncol = 5
)


RNA QC
...

snare <- subset(
  x = snare,
  subset = blacklist_fraction < 0.03 &
    TSS.enrichment < 20 &
    nCount_RNA > 800 &
    nCount_ATAC > 500
)
snare

注意: 如果是Signac V5, 这里会报错, Error when subsetting or when running other functions: value' must be a 'matrix' or 'dgCMatrix' · Issue #7685 · satijalab/seurat (github.com)
报错信息如下:

# Error in `LayerData<-`(object = `*tmp*`, layer = i, ..., value = value) :  
# 'value' must be a 'matrix' or 'dgCMatrix'

解决方法是把Assay对象转换成Assay5对象, 但更加稳妥的办法还是使用Seurat V4

snare[['RNA']] <- as(snare[['RNA']], "Assay5")
snare <- subset(
  x = snare,
  subset = blacklist_fraction < 0.03 &
    TSS.enrichment < 20 &
    nCount_RNA > 800 &
    nCount_ATAC > 500
)
snare

Data processing
...

Gene expression data processing
...

DefaultAssay(snare) <- "RNA"

snare <- FindVariableFeatures(snare, nfeatures = 3000)
snare <- NormalizeData(snare)
snare <- ScaleData(snare)
snare <- RunPCA(snare, npcs = 30)
snare <- RunUMAP(snare, dims = 1:30, reduction.name = "umap.rna")
snare <- FindNeighbors(snare, dims = 1:30)
snare <- FindClusters(snare, resolution = 0.5, algorithm = 3)

p1 <- DimPlot(snare, label = TRUE) + NoLegend() + ggtitle("RNA UMAP")

DNA accessibility data processing
...

DefaultAssay(snare) <- 'ATAC'

snare <- FindTopFeatures(snare, min.cutoff = 10)
snare <- RunTFIDF(snare)
snare <- RunSVD(snare)
snare <- RunUMAP(snare, reduction = 'lsi', dims = 2:30, reduction.name = 'umap.atac')

p2 <- DimPlot(snare, reduction = 'umap.atac', label = TRUE) + NoLegend() + ggtitle("ATAC UMAP")

p1 | p2

注释细胞
...

通过Allen Institute的成年小鼠大脑的现有scRNA-seq数据集对细胞类型进行注释

  • Allen Institute原始数据
  • 原始数据的处理方法
  • 处理过的对象
# label transfer from Allen brain
allen <- readRDS("./data/allen_brain.rds")

# use the RNA assay in the SNARE-seq data for integration with scRNA-seq
DefaultAssay(snare) <- 'RNA'

transfer.anchors <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference = allen,
  query = snare,
  dims = 1:30,
  reduction = 'cca'
)

predicted.labels <- TransferData(
  anchorset = transfer.anchors,
  refdata = allen$subclass,    # allen$subclass是在meta.data中的细胞分类信息
  weight.reduction = snare[['pca']],
  dims = 1:30
)

snare <- AddMetaData(object = snare, metadata = predicted.labels)

predicted.labels

label数据
...

for(i in levels(snare)) {
  cells_to_reid <- WhichCells(snare, idents = i)
  newid <- names(which.max(table(snare$predicted.id[cells_to_reid])))
  Idents(snare, cells = cells_to_reid) <- newid
}

snare@meta.data[["id"]] <- Idents(snare)

DimPlot(snare, group.by = 'id', label = TRUE, reduction = 'umap.rna')

可视化基因表达和DNA可及性
...

DefaultAssay(snare) <- "ATAC"
CoveragePlot(snare, region = "chr2-22620000-22660000", features = "Gad2")
